revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[Category:日本の設立 (世紀別)]] [[Category:19世紀の日本]]」

revision.comment: [[Template:Establishment category in country by century]] now only needs country parameters (via [[WP:JWB]])

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:19世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 19 في اليابان]] [[az:Category:XIX əsrdə Yaponiyada yarananlar]] [[bn:Category:১৯শ শতাব্দীতে জাপানে প্রতিষ্ঠিত]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 19th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۱۹ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:19-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ka:Category:XIX საუკუნეში დაარსებულები იაპონიაში]] [[ku:Category:Avabûnên sedsala 19an li Japonê]] [[pt:Category:Fundações no Japão do século XIX]] [[ru:Category:Появились в XIX веке в Японии]] [[simple:Category:19th-century establishments in Japan]] [[tr:Category:19. yüzyılda Japonya'da kurulan oluşumlar]] [[uk:Category:Засновані в Японії в XIX столітті]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں انیسویں صدی کی تاسیسات]] [[zh:Category:19世紀日本建立]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Kenkun Shrine]].

revision.comment: Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:19世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 19 في اليابان]] [[az:Category:XIX əsrdə Yaponiyada yarananlar]] [[bn:Category:১৯শ শতাব্দীতে জাপানে প্রতিষ্ঠিত]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 19th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۱۹ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:19-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ka:Category:XIX საუკუნეში დაარსებულები იაპონიაში]] [[ku:Category:Avabûnên sedsala 19an li Japonê]] [[pt:Category:Fundações no Japão do século XIX]] [[ru:Category:Появились в XIX веке в Японии]] [[simple:Category:19th-century establishments in Japan]] [[tr:Category:19. yüzyılda Japonya'da kurulan oluşumlar]] [[uk:Category:Засновані в Японії в XIX столітті]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں انیسویں صدی کی تاسیسات]] [[zh:Category:19世紀日本建立]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1880s_establishments_in_Japan]].

[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:19世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 19 في اليابان]] [[az:Category:XIX əsrdə Yaponiyada yarananlar]] [[bn:Category:১৯শ শতাব্দীতে জাপানে প্রতিষ্ঠিত]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 19th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۱۹ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:19-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ka:Category:XIX საუკუნეში დაარსებულები იაპონიაში]] [[ku:Category:Avabûnên sedsala 19an li Japonê]] [[pt:Category:Fundações no Japão do século XIX]] [[ru:Category:Появились в XIX веке в Японии]] [[simple:Category:19th-century establishments in Japan]] [[tr:Category:19. yüzyılda Japonya'da kurulan oluşumlar]] [[uk:Category:Засновані в Японії в XIX столітті]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں انیسویں صدی کی تاسیسات]] [[zh:Category:19世紀日本建立]] [[en:Category:19th-century establishments in Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8181326)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
